x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: GRC issues and exceptions provide the remediation context Now Assist uses for AI-driven risk prioritization.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Log and actively track control failures as issues. Document exceptions with risk justification. Ensure issues remain active until formally resolved.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_83f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cee
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[GRC issues and exceptions provide the remediation context Now Assist uses for AI-driven risk prioritization.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Issue and Exception Tracking</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("sn_grc_issue");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table sn_grc_issue not found", finding: "GRC Issue table (sn_grc_issue) is not available. Verify the GRC plugin is active." };
    }
    var ga = new GlideAggregate("sn_grc_issue");
    ga.addQuery("active", true);
    ga.addAggregate("COUNT");
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var actualValue = count + " active GRC issues";
    if (count >= 10) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: count + " active GRC issues being tracked — Now Assist GRC has remediation context for AI risk prioritization." };
    } else if (count >= 3) {
        return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + count + " active GRC issues (target: 10+). Now Assist GRC risk prioritization recommendations will have limited issue context." };
    } else {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + count + " active GRC issues tracked. Now Assist GRC uses active issue history for AI risk prioritization and remediation recommendations." };
    }
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>GRC</module><number>CHK0000461</number><order>70</order><remediation_guidance>Log and actively track control failures as issues. Document exceptions with risk justification. Ensure issues remain active until formally resolved.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>83f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cee</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Issue and Exception Tracking</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_83f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cee</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
